title: Asakura vs. Secret Asakura
overview: Hana Asakura's foster mother Tamao warns him not to use his shamanistic powers. One day, he is attacked by a boy who shares his family name.

title: West Tokyo Sound Effect Festival
overview: Hana returns to Funbari Hot Springs and reflects on his fight with his new rival Yohane. He then encounters Luca, who unleashes a powerful Over Soul.

title: The Return of the Precocious Shaman
overview: The girl who saved Hana says she has come to prepare for an upcoming battle. Later, Hana is surprised to meet an unexpected new classmate.

title: Sense of Loss
overview: After receiving some advice from Hana, Yohane declares that they are now friends. Soon after, Hana’s class receives yet another transfer student.

title: Shocking Mall
overview: Unable to call upon Amidamaru for help, Hana succumbs to Ryuji’s attack. Luca orders Ryuji to kill Hana, but Yohane senses she is being manipulated.

title: Oni Sleeps on the Riverbank
overview: Hana grows depressed after Alumi reveals how his death-defying power works. Later, Alumi goes to a flower shop run by the Muntzer siblings.

title: Demon Rumble
overview: Believing he's being challenged to a fight, Hana begins to battle the rebellious shaman. But as the duel goes on, he starts to lose his sanity.

title: Flower of Nanchara
overview: Alumi suddenly appears and puts a stop to Hana's aggression toward Gakko. She then explains the purpose of the Flower of Maize to Hana and Yohane.

title: The Same Age ~ Me, My Father, and My Uncle! ~
overview: Gakko and Yohane try to protect Hana from Tao Men's sudden attack but are swiftly defeated. An enraged Hana responds by unleashing a demonic power.

title: Island of Death Zero
overview: Suddenly finding himself beside a crashed fighter plane on a beach, Hana encounters the aircraft's pilot, who says they are in the middle of a war.

title: Black Maiden
overview: Thalim suddenly appears and brings Sakurai and Hana to his café to talk. At Funbari Hot Springs, Tao Men demands to see his mother's iron maiden.

title: Just Cuz?
overview: After Anderson's plane crashes into the café, Yohsuke uses special cards in a bid to stop Hao's plan to turn Sakurai into Hana's guardian spirit.

title: It's Love!!!
overview: Finding himself at a Japanese military airfield, Hana realizes it is the day before Sakurai's fateful flight. That night, the base comes under attack.
